info.name: BlazeDemo Auth API Tests
info.description: Tests for BlazeDemo Laravel-style web authentication HTML form workflows. These use application/x-www-form-urlencoded bodies, session cookies, and CSRF tokens. Flow: GET the form page to capture CSRF token, then POST the form.
